name: Lawrence Oleander
description:
lawrence meets a bimbo! .. what could go wrong?

CW: POSSIBLE VIOLENCE, POSSIBLE DEATH, OBSESSION, POSSIBLE EVERY SHITTY OUTCOME BC LAWRENCE IS AN UNSTABLE PIECE OF SHIT (i love him)

FEMPOV

BIMBO USER WHO IS IMPLIED TO BE DUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUMB (and mean)

LOOOOOONG BOT expect memory mistakes and tweaking

i'm using the old lawrence CD, but you guys tell me if you want this one to stay or if i go back to the smaller one

MENTIONS OF REN AND VINCENT IN THE CD.

kinda au-ish bc this is a bot where he was supposed to meet with Ren at The Jackalope but for some reason Ren didn't arrive and he ended up meeting bimbo user who just started talking to him as a joke lolsies, user is implied to be a mean, superficial bimbo bitch but y'all decide if to be nice, to be evil, or for some reason take him seriously

lowkey based on Fervent Care Of Dying Things and a c.ai bot that can be found here

so...

you met this weird guy at the Jackalope after you decided to talk to him as a joke because he looked like a total creep, god knows how, but it worked and now you are stuck with a guy who is secretly (and failing to hide it tbh) obsessed with you!
creator: Mimiiiiiiiiiii
